description: This file provides adapter functions for the frontend to interact with backend or mock data sources. It includes functions to create mock and REST adapters, which abstract API calls for listing sites, alerts, anomalies, reports, and handling alert acknowledgments, dismissals, and report generation.

methods.name: createMockAdapter()
methods.description: Creates a mock adapter that provides in-memory sample data for frontend use, emulating backend responses asynchronously.

methods.name: createRestAdapter(options = {})
methods.description: Creates a REST adapter that communicates with a backend API via HTTP requests, using specified options like base URL.

methods.name: createBackendAdapter()
methods.description: Factory function that returns either a mock or REST adapter based on backend configuration.
